title: Bray's Classic Ghasts
description: This pack changes the texture for ghasts and happy ghasts to 16x, reverting the change that occurred in 1.21.6
body:
![Classic Ghasts Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/550b8f52e27010d42aa0748f5f509b6f5bd3eb37.png)
------------------------
<center>
  
# Don't cry! The classic ghast texture is back!

</center>

In 1.21.6, Mojang increased the texture for ghasts to 64x64 pixels, doubling its texture density from the ghast texture we are used to...

**Bray's Classic Ghasts** reverts the texture changes to ghasts made in 1.21.6 as well as downscaling the happy ghast texture to match!

![Classic Ghasts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/991a92a6d9a0d8da233dfd4b4728683a1de428f1.jpeg)
**(harness textures not updated in this screenshot... Oops :D)**

### Affected textures
* Ghast
* Happy Ghast
* White Harness
* Light Gray Harness
* Gray Harness
* Black Harness
* Brown Harness
* Red Harness
* Orange Harness
* Yellow Harness
* Lime Harness
* Green Harness
* Cyan Harness
* Light Blue Harness
* Blue Harness
* Purple Harness
* Magenta Harness
* Pink Harness



![Ghast Riding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c937b9c09db1513fb258c68dcce6bb095c957a77_0.webp)
